component.name: Card
component.description: A surface container that groups related content with consistent padding, border-radius, and optional elevation. Use to visually separate page sections, form groups, or feature highlights. Card accepts any library component as children.
component.figmaNodeId: none — no Figma component set exists

when: Grouping a set of related form fields or content items into a distinct visual section
A page section needs a distinct background to separate it from the page canvas
Displaying a content item (course, article, product) in a list or grid
A feature or selected state needs visual elevation above sibling content

antiPatterns.reason: Creates visual depth that is hard to scan; nested surfaces lose hierarchy meaning.
antiPatterns.alternative: Separate the inner content into a Stack or Box, or reconsider the layout hierarchy.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Card as a full-page background
antiPatterns.reason: Card is a grouping surface, not a page background. A full-page card makes every section a nested container.
antiPatterns.alternative: Apply page-background colour with the container-page token on the root layout element.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using padding='none' and adding raw padding via style
antiPatterns.reason: Bypasses the token-driven padding system; visual inconsistency results.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use the padding prop ('sm', 'md', 'lg') for all padding needs.

purpose.default: Flat surface on the page background. Primary container for form sections and content groups.
purpose.elevated: Raised surface above the page background. Use for featured content, selected card states, or content that must visually float above siblings.

states.description: Static container — no interactive states. Elevation is set at render time via the variant prop.

ariaAttributes: aria-label or aria-labelledby (recommended when multiple Cards appear on the same page so each region is distinguishable)

compositionPatterns.name: form-section
compositionPatterns.description: A Card wrapping a Stack of form inputs, used to group related fields in a settings or onboarding form.

compositionPatterns.name: preferences-section
compositionPatterns.description: A Card wrapping a group of Checkboxes with a section heading.

compositionPatterns.name: content-card
compositionPatterns.description: A Card presenting a single content item (course, article) with title, metadata, body text, and a CTA Button.
